task_completion.description: Open the Electrical Engineering Calculations app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the main menu or interface of the Electrical Calculations app.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the transformer calculation section of the app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the transformer calculation screen within the app.

task_completion.description: Enter the primary voltage, secondary voltage, and primary turns into the app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields in the app filled with the values: 480 (Primary Voltage), 120 (Secondary Voltage), and 600 (Primary Turns).

task_completion.description: Perform the calculation to view the secondary turns and turns ratio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app displaying the calculated results: 150 for secondary turns and 4 (or 4:1) for the turns ratio.

task_completion.description: Open a text editor or terminal to save the results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor app or terminal emulator is open and active on the screen.

task_completion.description: Save the calculated results to /sdcard/transformer_result.txt in the specified format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'secondary_turns=150' and 'turns_ratio=4' being written or saved to the file path '/sdcard/transformer_result.txt'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the Electrical Calculations app to find the answer.
integrity.visual_evidence: There must be screenshots showing the agent interacting with the Electrical Calculations app GUI. The agent should not bypass the app by calculating the values externally or via a Python script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply hardcode the expected output into the text file without performing the app calculation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory must show the progression of opening the app, entering the inputs, and seeing the results before the text file is created and populated.

integrity.description: Verify the results are saved to the exact requested file path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path '/sdcard/transformer_result.txt' must be clearly visible in the terminal command or text editor save dialog.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct calculated values are 150 for secondary turns and 4 for the turns ratio. The target file path is /sdcard/transformer_result.txt. The required format is exactly 'secondary_turns=150' and 'turns_ratio=4' (or 'turns_ratio=4:1' if the app outputs it as a ratio string, though 4 is the expected numeric value).
